target_skill.name: delegate-analytical
target_skill.description: Sonnet sub-agent for solo judgment — review, compare, rank, evaluate. Use proactively. Not for flaw-finding (→ delegate-adversarial), rote (→ delegate-mechanical), or panel (→ review-panel).

competing_skills.name: delegate-mechanical
competing_skills.description: Haiku sub-agent for rote bulk work — summarize, extract, scaffold, compress, filter by tag/keyword, scan. Use proactively. Not for judgment (→ delegate-analytical) or async (→ fire-routine).

competing_skills.name: delegate-adversarial
competing_skills.description: Opus sub-agent for solo flaw-finding — adversarial review, security audit, "tear this apart", architecture critique. Not for standard review (→ delegate-analytical) or panel (→ review-panel).

competing_skills.name: review-panel
competing_skills.description: Multi-agent review — "panel review", "Gemini review", "full review", "calibrate scores", "audit my vault". Auto-runs as build Phase 7. Not solo (→ delegate-analytical/adversarial).

competing_skills.name: idea-scout
competing_skills.description: Evaluate a raw idea with scoring — "scout this", "what if we built", "is this viable". Auto-fires on new ideas in fresh chats. Not for building (→ architect) or saving without eval (→ idea-vault).

positive_cases: Review this draft pitch for clarity and impact
Compare these three architecture options and rank them
Evaluate which of these naming options reads best
Rank these four refactor approaches by trade-off
negative_cases: Extract every URL from this API response (expect delegate-mechanical)
Tear this architecture apart — every flaw, every failure mode (expect delegate-adversarial)
Run a full panel review on the new skill before I push (expect review-panel)
Scout this raw idea: a Slack bot for Grove digests — is it viable? (expect idea-scout)
Summarize this 4-page transcript into one paragraph (expect delegate-mechanical)
